_comment: Positive fixture for PRD-105-R10 — a CDN response trace demonstrating correct 304 Not Modified handling. The consumer sent If-None-Match matching the resource's stored ETag; the CDN MUST return 304 with no body. Cite PRD-103 for ETag derivation; PRD-105 only requires the CDN to honor revalidation.
_notes: ETag value byte-equal to the consumer's If-None-Match — CDN MUST return 304.
No response body on 304 per RFC 9110 §15.4.5.
Cache-Control max-age 600 (10 minutes) is producer-tunable; PRD-105-R11 recommends 5–60 minutes.
Content-Type is informational on a 304 (no body) but SHOULD match the resource's normal type.
